message:
feat(server): expose public dispatch_request API and re-export types (#15)

Add Server::dispatch_request() — a thin public wrapper around the
internal handle_request() — so external code can process a single
JSON-RPC request against a &Server without going through a Transport
abstraction. This enables custom transports, HTTP proxies, and embedded
MCP endpoints that manage their own session lifecycle and concurrency.

Re-export NotificationSender, RequestSender, PendingRequests, and the
bidirectional module from the fastmcp facade crate so consumers can
use the dispatch API with a single dependency.

Also fix a pre-existing compilation error where HttpRequestExecutionMode
called self.router.as_ref() on a plain Router (not Arc/Option).

Implements Parts A and C of issue #15 (Part B was fixed in 402bc43).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
